---
title: "Drone Mapping Software Costs Comparison"
id: material-hs-4
order: 101
summary: "Overview of the static calculated economic costs of drone data processing software."
source_url: "https://blog.flykit.app/pix4d-vs-dronedeploy-vs-agisoft-vs-mme-vs-webodm-a-comparison-of-processing-costs/"
modules:
  - module-postprocessing
Goals:
  - module-goals-pp
activities: []
assessments:
  - pp-assessment
labels:
  - supplement
  - optional
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/Postprocessing/material-hs-4.md"
---
